ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT "対象事業者ID"
   FROM ( SELECT
                CASE
                    WHEN (a.group_type_id = 2) THEN a.order_customer_id
                    ELSE a.builder_id
                END AS "対象事業者ID"
           FROM ((((t_object_order a
             JOIN m_group b ON ((a.group_id = b.group_id)))
             JOIN m_customer_default c ON ((a.builder_id = c.customer_id)))
             JOIN m_order_status d ON ((a.order_status_id = d.order_status_id)))
             JOIN t_object_warranty e ON ((a.latest_warranty_id = e.warranty_id)))
          WHERE ((a.active_flg = 1) AND (d.warranty_confirm_flg = 1) AND (b.warranty_check_unnecessary_flg = 0) AND (c.warranty_check_unnecessary_flg = 0) AND ((e.next_warranty_check_date <= CURRENT_DATE) OR (e.next_warranty_check_date IS NULL)))) main
  GROUP BY "対象事業者ID";
